runbooks.name: architecture_session
runbooks.description: Architecture review stage layout — system diagram, repo structure, API contract, proposed change comparison.

sequence.data_hint: the system or component diagram under discussion
directories and files touched by the proposal
representative request/response for the new or changed endpoint
current vs proposed structure, config, or code shape

runbooks.name: demo_launch
runbooks.description: Demo or launch stage layout — feature carousel, before/after video pair, headline metric, reliability timeline.

sequence.data_hint: one slide per headline feature with screenshot and caption
left: previous behaviour; right: new behaviour
label: the launch KPI; value: current; previous: pre-launch baseline
service health blocks over the launch window

runbooks.name: sprint_review
runbooks.description: Sprint review stage layout — velocity and bug KPIs, completion progress, backlog table, burn-down chart.

sequence.data_hint: value: story points completed this sprint; delta: vs previous sprint; is_up from delta sign
value: open bug count; delta: change over sprint; accent red when rising
value: percent of committed scope done; label: sprint name; caption: days remaining
rows: carry-over and top backlog items with owner and status columns
labels: sprint days; datasets: [ideal burn-down, actual remaining points]

runbooks.name: team_standup
runbooks.description: Team standup stage layout — one bio card per person, blockers checklist, status badges.

sequence.data_hint: name, role, and yesterday/today summary per team member
title: Blockers; items: open blockers with owner in each string
one badge per workstream; color green/yellow/red by health; pulse on items needing attention
